## Summary
- What changed?
- Why did this change happen?

## Linked Docs
- PRD:
- Task:
- Issue:

> Net-new feature work should normally link a GitHub issue and follow the issue-first flow documented in `docs/playbooks/github-issue-first-flow.md`.

## Verification
- [ ] Lint
- [ ] Typecheck
- [ ] Tests
- [ ] Manual critical path check

## Evidence
- Commands run:
- Screenshots or notes:
- Remaining risks:

## Docs Updated
- [ ] Architecture docs
- [ ] PRD / task docs
- [ ] API contract
- [ ] Domain model

## Commit Convention
This repo currently uses the `Lore Commit Protocol` defined in `AGENTS.md`.
